message: ci: fix pack check for esm cli

files.patch:
@@ -54,7 +54,7 @@ jobs:
             echo "No root pack artifact found in _pack/root" >&2
             exit 1
           fi
-          tar -tf "$ROOT_TARBALL" | grep -E '^package/dist/cli\.cjs$'
+          tar -tf "$ROOT_TARBALL" | grep -E '^package/dist/cli\.js$'
 
           echo "==> core"
           ls -la _pack/core
